title: Join preload with named binding threading through where
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.active_authors_recent_posts/1` that: (a) joins posts with their author via named binding `as: :author`, (b) filters to authors with `u.active == true` using the named binding, (c) filters posts to the last 30 days, (d) preloads `:author` via the threaded binding `preload: [author: u]`, (e) orders by `inserted_at desc`. The binding name must work both in the where clause AND in the preload. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: The named binding has to carry through where, preload, and order_by simultaneously — several places to lose the thread.
